endpoint_schema.title: Pipedrive Users
endpoint_schema.description: Returns an array of user objects representing team members within the Pipedrive company account.

activated.description: Whether the user has completed account activation (email confirmation)

last_login.description: The last login date and time of the user. Format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS

created.description: The creation date and time of the user. Format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS

modified.description: The last modification date and time of the user. Format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS

has_created_company.description: Boolean that indicates whether the user has created a company

access.description: The access permissions granted to the user across different apps

app.description: The application name (e.g., global, sales, campaigns, projects, account_settings, partnership)

admin.description: Whether the user has admin access for this app

permission_set_id.description: The UUID of the permission set assigned for this app

active_flag.description: Whether the user account is currently active (not deactivated by an admin)

role_id.description: The ID of the user role

is_you.description: Boolean that indicates if the requested user is the same which is logged in

is_deleted.description: Boolean that indicates whether the user is deleted from the company
